title: Verify user can fully cancel the trial after rejecting all retention offers
description: Tests the complete cancellation flow where the user rejects both the reminder nudge and the incentive offer.
preconditions: User is on the 'Trial Corner' hub page.

steps.description: 2. On the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up, click 'Cancel Anyway & Lose Access'.
3. On the 'Incentive' pop-up, click the secondary action to reject the offer (e.g., 'Cancel Anyway').
6. Navigate back to the homepage and the Trial Corner.

expected_result: The user's trial is immediately cancelled and all premium access is revoked. The homepage widget and Trial Corner hub update to the 'Cancelled Trial' design, with content sections locked. The `feedback-popup-viewed` and `feedback-submitted` events are fired.
